task: Open the profile page of the leader of the Nvidia Learning and Perception Lab.
final_result_response:
Successfully opened the profile page of **Jan Kautz**, the leader (VP) of the NVIDIA Learning and Perception Research Lab.

**Page URL:** https://research.nvidia.com/person/jan-kautz

**Key Details:**
- **Role:** Leads the Learning & Perception Research team at NVIDIA
- **Research Focus:** Computer vision and machine learning — including low-level vision (denoising, super-resolution), geometric vision (SLAM, optical flow), high-level vision (detection, recognition), and fundamental ML algorithms.
- **Background:** Joined NVIDIA in 2013; previously a tenured faculty at University College London; PhD from Max-Planck-Institut für Informatik; post-doc at MIT.
- **Publications:** Extensive list at top venues including CVPR, ICLR, and NeurIPS.
